title: pilosella prussica
intro: Pilosella prussica, also known as Prussian dandelion or Prussian hawk's beard, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, Pilosella prussica has been used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial compounds. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as treating digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems. The herbal preparations of Pilosella prussica include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to create teas, salves, and topical creams for medicinal purposes.
